visual_intent: light routing support for the reel
brand_guardrails: protect Story-safe top and bottom zones
do not turn the Story into a feed-style explainer
keep it lighter and more conversational than the reel
all three frames must use the exact same card architecture
all three frames must use the exact same border behavior or no border behavior
all three frames must use the same text color density, type weight family, and margin system
composition: small apricot cue on the CTA frame only
full rounded white card fills the canvas
same text-box width and centered layout across all frames
reference_strategy: Use the whitespace and body-copy anchors to drive a clean Set 1 Story system, then use the cool-palette anchor only for soft atmospheric color control.
variation_guardrails: keep all three frames inside one calm visual set
do not make the background too photographic
optimize for mobile readability over visual complexity
do not use fake buttons or cluttered stickers
do not switch card systems between frames
frame 03 may add CTA emphasis only if the base layout remains identical
reject the batch if typography weight, darkness, or margins drift between frames

text_overlay.headline_ja: 気合いで押し切る日が 続いていませんか。
slides_ja: 気合いで押し切る日が 続いていませんか。
見直したいのは、勢いより 毎日のコンディション。
今日のリールで 土台から考える視点を。

notes: March 25 same-day reinforcement Story. Hard batch lock: one full rounded white-card system across all 3 frames, same margins, same text style, same atmosphere. Reject if the set does not look uniform side by side.
